rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHARLES YOUNG CHONG et al TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue And Request For Attorney Fees And Expenses
rulings.Rulings: The Motion for Change of Venue is GRANTED. The Court finds that the principal place of administration of the Chong Trust is Sacramento County. (Prob. Code Section 17005.) The Court DENIES the request for attorneys fees. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order. Should any party wish to contest the tentative ruling, that party shall notify all parties and the Court no later than 4:00 p.m. today (September 23, 2014).
